I suppose there is somewhat of a difference between waiting and watching. We could illustrate it perhaps by a story I heard of a Scottish fishing village. After many days at sea, the skipper of the fishing boat was bringing the craft back home. It would have been gone away from home for months. And if they neared shore, the men gazed eagerly toward the dock. where a group of their loved ones were watching. The skipper looking through his eyeglass identified some of the women.
